title: Kagenti’s Approach to Multi-Agent Security for AI Agents
summary: Kagenti applies identity-based security and delegation chains to secure multi-agent AI systems. The approach aims to prevent data leaks and invisible breaches in production agentic systems using open source infrastructure and zero-trust architecture.
writeup: This IBM Technology video covers Kagenti, an approach to securing multi-agent AI systems through identity-based security and delegation chains. The problem it addresses is data leaks and invisible breaches that can occur in production agentic systems. The proposed defenses rely on open source infrastructure and a zero-trust architecture, with identity tied to each agent and delegation tracked across the chain of interactions.
